p.span: In practice, chisel3.Mem and ReadSyncMem has proven to be poorly compatible with the RAM Blocks in some manufacturers' FPGAs.

chisel3.ReadSyncMem uses a synchronous addr input with clock and a direct dout output, which is not supported in some manufacturers' RAM Blocks, which often only support direct addr input with synchronous dout.
provides various RAMs with underlying Inline Verilog HDL architecture that have been proven compatible with RAM Blocks in most vendors' FPGAs.
